name: chr4_NLR_block_1
description: Chromosome 4 right-arm NLR (NOD-like receptor) cluster sub-block. Zebrafish has the largest known vertebrate NLR expansion (~400 genes), almost all concentrated on chr4 q-arm. Intra-cluster identity 70-95%, frequent tandem duplications and segmental duplications. The 'novel fish' NLR subfamily (NLR-C) accounts for most of the expansion. Howe 2013 reports the q-arm is also heterochromatin-dense and gene-poor in non-NLR categories.
